reason: Approved design defines breadcrumb scope, resolver rules, runtime boundary, and non-goals.
Implementation must execute rollout steps in order and update step status.
Requirement explains user-visible optional runtime breadcrumb capability and boundaries.
Roadmap defines optional runtime module and item sequencing.
Optional Workflow-state Breadcrumb contract is a hard roadmap companion constraint.
Context manifest is one of the artifacts the breadcrumb should point to, not replace.
Breadcrumb must not become subagent dispatch and should remain separate from handoff protocol.
Breadcrumb must not implement research routing or background research.
